reviews.review_title: A solid start for patient gamers
reviews.review_description: The bones of a solid game are here but I think there are some real opportunities for quality of life updates. Stop the orbs from moving. I have my path dialed in, it doesn't make sense for them to move. The dials should also be able to be turned with the controller joystick if your hand is by it. Maybe a speed option. If I'm just changing the last dial, can I speed up the rocket and time proportionally (to keep the integrity of the leaderboards)? All that being said, if you want to think and play a solo game, each level takes a good amount of time and trial and error.
